sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Kum simin mi siangtho te kikhawm uh hi
Gam minthang tawh ki nai theihna ding in

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Gam minthang hong piang a hun tung dek ta hi
Gam minthang hong piang a hun tung dek ta hi
Sawtlo pengkul tum ding hi Kumpipa

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Hong gum Topa hong pai ding hun i ngak hi

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Sawtvei i ngak ciang hih leitungah
Meii kai manin mihing lungsim kisia hi
gam minthan'na thu gen in la

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Topa bawlsa vantung gamhong tung ciang
Hong pai ma in vantung gam i mu ding hi
Halelujah a si tawh hong gum
